Documentation.name: Open Data Contract Specification (ODSC)
Documentation.notes: Contains elements to model Open Data Contract Specifications (ODCS)

Property.name: _tagGroupings
Property.value: exclusiveMaximum=Logical Type Options;exclusiveMinimum=Logical Type Options;format=Logical Type Options;maximum=Logical Type Options;maxItems=Logical Type Options;maxLength=Logical Type Options;maxProperties=Logical Type Options;minimum=Logical Type Options;minItems=Logical Type Options;minLength=Logical Type Options;minProperties=Logical Type Options;multipleOf=Logical Type Options;pattern=Logical Type Options;uniqueItems=Logical Type Options;timezone=Logical Type Options;defaultTimezone=Logical Type Options;required=Logical Type Options;
